environment.description: passthrough = your real room (AR). void = plain dark backdrop (VR / desktop preview).

seats.description: Named anchor points, relative to the office origin (spawns in front of you).

rotation.description: Yaw in degrees (before facing the user).

forward.description: Meters in front of you the office origin appears.

id.description: Unique id used by the app (slug).

emoji.description: Icon shown in the lobby and HUD.

brain.description: OpenClaw agent id this avatar talks to.

seat.description: Name of a seat from office.seats.

desc.description: Short description shown in the lobby card.

tone.description: Personality for the fast persona layer (ack / summary / small talk).

phrases.description: Optional folder id under assets/voz/ for pre-generated v3 phrases.
